prompts: The completed message that is clearing the pause/resume button should be only after all the pagination is complete, not after a single page is complete, we need different messages to make sure this is clear.

still not working properly we are getting a completed message but not all the pagination is completed. We can see from the page how many pages there are so we shouldn't be hiding the pause/resume until all pagination is done. Ensure we are using the correct completed message to hide. We want the complete scraping job not the completed page message

The last fix still does not work. The plugin app indicates that there are 8 pages (current page) but as we can see from the image we are on the 3rd page. The 'this page' stat shows '0' is incorrect. The scroll to top floating button does not display yet.
The current page keeps incrementing (maybe some kind of repeat or error handling), the 'this page' should probably be the count of properties on the page.

After completing the 3 searches in the plugin search scrape, then it tries to unsuccessfully do 5 more scrapes for pages that don't exist. Since we can see how many pages there are in total on the first page there is no reason why we should be trying to scrape pages that don't exist.

The total cards should be on the same line as the other stats (current page, this page) and make the font smaller. Also reduce the height of the property card list if we are displaying the panel with the [select all] button otherwise the controls end up off page. Also, put the scroll to top button in the center of the page instead of off to the right side.
